# Documentation for using crates

## rkyv

The rkyv crate provides zero-copy deserialization for efficient data transfer between nodes. This is useful in distributed mode when the master serialize the rdd/partitions and send it to worker for processing. 

When the user ask about rkyv refer to the resources below before implementing   

### Docs

https://rkyv.org/
https://github.com/rkyv/rkyv
